events.agenda: Inaugural Helsinki dbt Meetup covering dbt development practices, the case for a semantic layer, and Aiven's raw-to-refined data modeling journey.
events.event_description: An event for the Helsinki dbt community to connect and collaborate, welcoming data analysts, scientists, engineers, and architects.

Wed, Mar 15, 2023 · 4:30 PM to 7:30 PM EET

Fredrikinkatu 51, Helsinki

Helsinki dbt Meetup

17.00: dbt development practices: the good, the bad and the ugly, Romulo Carvalho, Data & Analytics Consultant, Kaito Insight
17:30: Why semantic layer is (obviously) a good idea, Kosti Hokkanen, Senior Data Engineer, Supermetrics
18.00: Data modelling at Aiven: a journey from raw to refined data, Stijn Zanders, Manager Data Engineering, Aiven
